data.title: A10 Networks Reports Strong Q1 Results, Declares Dividend
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

A10 Networks ( (ATEN) ) has provided an update.

On April 28, 2026, A10 Networks reported first-quarter 2026 revenue of $75.0 million, up 13.4% year over year, with GAAP net income of $12.0 million and non-GAAP net income of $17.7 million. The company posted GAAP gross margin of 79.6%, non-GAAP gross margin of 80.6%, Adjusted EBITDA of $22.5 million, and ended March 31, 2026 with $369.8 million in cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities.

Management highlighted strong demand from AI infrastructure deployments as a key growth driver, citing expanded commitments from top customers and an ability to manage supply constraints while improving profitability. The company returned $6.8 million to investors in the quarter via share repurchases and dividends, and on April 28, 2026 the board approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.06 per share, payable June 1, 2026 to shareholders of record on May 15, 2026, underscoring confidence in its cash generation and capital return strategy.

A10 said its growth momentum, disciplined execution, and focus on innovation are supporting both continued investment in its technology and ongoing capital returns to shareholders. Management reiterated its previously issued 2026 guidance, including full-year revenue growth of 10–12%, Adjusted EBITDA margin of 28–30%, and earnings per share growth expected to outpace revenue growth on a year-over-year basis.

The most recent analyst rating on (ATEN) stock is a Hold with a $24.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on A10 Networks stock, see the ATEN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ATEN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ATEN is a Outperform.

ATEN scores well on fundamentals and outlook: strong margins/cash generation and a constructive earnings call with growth and margin-expansion guidance. The main offsets are the sharp recent increase in leverage, a relatively high P/E with a modest yield, and technically overbought momentum that can elevate near-term volatility.

To see Spark’s full report on ATEN stock, click here.

More about A10 Networks

A10 Networks, Inc. is a provider of secure application services and solutions, focusing on performance, availability, and security for AI-driven and other high-volume network architectures. The company serves both enterprises and service providers as converging AI workloads blur traditional customer segments, positioning A10 at a critical control point where network performance and cybersecurity intersect.

Average Trading Volume: 1,056,402

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $1.98B

Learn more about ATEN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Helio Corporation ( (HLEO) ) has shared an update.

On April 22, 2026, Helio Corporation entered into an exchange agreement with Chief Technology Officer Gregory T. Delory, cancelling $327,629 in promissory notes in return for 149,979 shares of common stock valued at a 20-day VWAP conversion price of $2.1845. This debt-for-equity swap, completed with the issuance of the shares on April 28, 2026 as restricted and control securities under the Securities Act, reduces the company’s debt obligations while modestly diluting existing shareholders and further aligning the CTO’s interests with the company’s equity performance.

More about Helio Corporation

Helio Corporation operates in the technology sector and is led by executives including Chief Technology Officer Gregory T. Delory. The company’s capital structure includes common stock traded on the OTC Markets Group, reflecting a shareholder base that can be affected by equity-based compensation and financing decisions.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: CTO Realty Growth Posts Strong Q1 2026 Results, Raises Outlook
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

CTO Realty Growth ( (CTO) ) just unveiled an update.

CTO Realty Growth reported solid first-quarter 2026 results on April 28, 2026, with net income attributable to common stockholders rising to $0.13 per diluted share and Core FFO and AFFO per diluted share increasing to $0.52 and $0.56, respectively. Shopping center same-property NOI climbed 6.8%, leased occupancy reached 95.4%, and the REIT executed 146,000 square feet of comparable leases at a 14% cash rent spread, underscoring leasing strength despite a large 2025 vacancy in Albuquerque.

During the quarter, CTO acquired the 399,000-square-foot Palms Crossing open-air retail center in McAllen, Texas, for $81.6 million and saw the $30 million Watters Creek preferred investment repaid, while subsequently investing $75 million of preferred equity in a premier Southwest retail property at a 12% cash yield. With liquidity of $124.3 million, net debt to pro forma adjusted EBITDA of 6.4x, and only one small 2026 loan maturity, the company raised its 2026 investment guidance to $175 million–$250 million and lifted its Core FFO and AFFO per-share outlook, signaling confidence in growth and portfolio performance.

The most recent analyst rating on (CTO) stock is a Buy with a $22.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on CTO Realty Growth stock, see the CTO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CTO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CTO is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by improved balance-sheet risk and a constructive 2026 operating/guidance backdrop, reinforced by an uptrend in price. The main constraints are inconsistent profitability (including negative EBITDA margin in 2025) and uneven free cash flow, with valuation support coming more from the high dividend yield than earnings-based metrics.

To see Spark’s full report on CTO stock, click here.

More about CTO Realty Growth

CTO Realty Growth, Inc. is a publicly traded real estate investment company that owns and operates shopping centers, focusing on open-air retail properties in higher‑growth U.S. markets. Its portfolio is anchored by national retailers, and the company also uses preferred equity and structured investments to gain exposure to Class A retail assets while managing balance sheet flexibility.

Average Trading Volume: 246,645

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $640.4M

data.description:

Bank Of Hawaii ( (BOH) ) just unveiled an announcement.

At its annual shareholders’ meeting on April 24, 2026, Bank of Hawaii Corporation shareholders elected the full slate of board nominees, with each director receiving a substantial majority of votes cast, although some candidates drew higher opposition than others. The board’s composition was thus reaffirmed for another term, signaling continuity in corporate governance and strategic oversight.

Shareholders also approved the re-appointment of Ernst & Young LLP as independent auditor for the 2026 fiscal year by a wide margin, underscoring confidence in the company’s financial reporting processes and external oversight. In contrast, the advisory vote on executive compensation reflected a more divided shareholder base, with a significant bloc voting against the pay package, highlighting ongoing scrutiny of leadership incentives and alignment with shareholder interests.

The most recent analyst rating on (BOH) stock is a Buy with a $95.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Bank Of Hawaii stock, see the BOH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BOH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BOH is a Outperform.

BOH scores well primarily on solid financial performance (improving profitability, very conservative leverage, and strong TTM cash generation) and a constructive earnings outlook (NIM expansion, improving deposit costs, strong capital/returns). Technicals are supportive with an uptrend, while valuation is reasonable with a mid-teens P/E and attractive yield; key risks are expense pressure, moderated loan growth, and pockets of credit uncertainty.

To see Spark’s full report on BOH stock, click here.

More about Bank Of Hawaii

Bank of Hawaii Corporation is a regional financial institution that provides banking and financial services, including deposit accounts, lending, and related financial products, primarily serving consumers and businesses in Hawaii and the broader Pacific region. The company operates as a traditional bank, with a focus on community and regional markets, and is publicly held with an active base of institutional and retail shareholders.

data.description:

The latest announcement is out from F5, Inc. ( (FFIV) ).

On April 24, 2026, F5, Inc. appointed Anand Eswaran to its board of directors, expanding the board to nine members, eight of whom are independent. He will sit on the Audit and Talent and Compensation Committees and receive standard non‑employee director cash retainers and a restricted stock unit grant effective May 1, 2026.

Eswaran, currently CEO of Veeam Software and a veteran executive of companies including RingCentral, Microsoft, SAP, and Hewlett‑Packard, is expected to bolster F5’s expertise in software, AI, and scaling high‑growth businesses. His appointment underscores F5’s strategic focus on innovation and positioning for an AI‑driven future as it continues to deliver and secure applications and APIs across complex digital environments.

The most recent analyst rating on (FFIV) stock is a Buy with a $355.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on F5, Inc. stock, see the FFIV Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on FFIV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, FFIV is a Outperform.

FFIV scores well on core fundamentals (high margins, strong ROE, robust free cash flow, and low leverage) and is supported by a strong earnings-call read-through with raised FY26 guidance. The score is tempered by recent TTM revenue contraction, only moderately positive technicals (below the 200-day with elevated stochastic), and a valuation that looks fair rather than clearly discounted (P/E ~20.4, no dividend yield provided).

To see Spark’s full report on FFIV stock, click here.

More about F5, Inc.

F5, Inc. is a global leader in application delivery and security, providing the F5 Application Delivery and Security Platform to deliver and secure apps and APIs across on‑premises, cloud, edge, and hybrid multicloud environments. Backed by three decades of expertise, the company focuses on enabling fast, available, and secure digital experiences for large, advanced organizations worldwide.

F5 leverages its technology and partnerships to help enterprises manage complex, distributed digital infrastructures while protecting critical workloads. Its offerings target organizations seeking to secure and optimize every app and API in an increasingly AI‑driven and cloud‑centric landscape.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $17.13B

data.title: Tortoise Energy Infrastructure Announces Director Resignation and Transition
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Tortoise Energy Infrastructure Corp ( (TYG) ) is now available.

Tortoise Energy Infrastructure Corp. disclosed that director Alexandra Herger submitted her resignation from the company’s board in a letter dated April 24, 2026, with her board departure to take effect on July 1, 2026. On the same day, April 24, 2026, she stepped down as chair of the board’s Nominating and Governance Committee, and the company noted that her decision did not stem from any disagreement over its operations, policies, practices or with other board members, suggesting an orderly governance transition rather than a sign of internal conflict.

Herger’s planned exit as both director and committee chair signals a forthcoming change in Tortoise Energy Infrastructure Corp.’s board leadership and governance oversight, but the clarification that no disputes prompted her resignation may reassure investors and other stakeholders about the stability of the company’s strategic direction. The move underscores routine board refreshment practices in the energy infrastructure investment sector, where continuity and alignment with shareholders’ interests are closely watched.

More about Tortoise Energy Infrastructure Corp

Tortoise Energy Infrastructure Corp. is an investment company focused on energy infrastructure assets, providing investors exposure to companies that own and operate pipelines, storage facilities, and related midstream energy infrastructure. The firm targets income-generating securities in the energy sector, with a particular focus on stable, fee-based businesses supporting North American energy markets.

Average Trading Volume: 102,728

data.title: U-BX Technology Raises $4.55 Million in Nasdaq Registered Direct Offering
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

U-BX Technology Ltd. ( (UBXG) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 27, 2026, U-BX Technology Ltd. entered into securities purchase agreements for a registered direct offering of 15,166,668 units at $0.30 per unit, each comprising one Class A ordinary share and a warrant to purchase 0.3 of a share, with warrants featuring a capped cashless exercise option and a one-year term. The offering, conducted on a best-efforts basis with FT Global Capital as lead placement agent and Kingswood as co-placement agent, closed on April 28, 2026 and raised approximately $4.55 million in gross proceeds, which the Nasdaq-listed insurtech plans to deploy for working capital, R&D and general corporate purposes, modestly strengthening its balance sheet as it pursues AI-based insurance services growth.

The securities were issued under U-BX Technology’s effective shelf registration statement on Form F-3 declared effective in December 2025, providing structural flexibility for future capital raises. Compensation to the placement agent included an 8.5% success fee and expense reimbursements, while the company entered customary covenants and indemnification provisions, signaling a standard small-cap financing designed to support ongoing operations without fundamentally altering its capital structure beyond share and warrant dilution for existing shareholders.

More about U-BX Technology Ltd.

Headquartered in Beijing, U-BX Technology Ltd. is a China-based insurance technology provider serving insurance carriers and brokers. The company offers AI-driven value-added services including digital promotion for institutional clients, its “Magic Mirror” algorithm for auto insurance risk assessment, and bundled benefits such as auto maintenance and other vehicle-related services.

Average Trading Volume: 33,488

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $43.64M

data.title: NeuroSense Secures Insider-Led $600,000 PIPE at Premium Share Price
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Neurosense Therapeutics Ltd. ( (NRSN) ) has issued an update.

On April 28, 2026, NeuroSense Therapeutics Ltd. announced it had entered into a definitive agreement for a $600,000 insider-led private investment in public equity financing, selling 750,000 ordinary shares at $0.80 per share, a 6.7% premium to the prior day’s close. The transaction, led by CEO Alon Ben-Noon, CFO Or Eisenberg and a major existing shareholder with $200,000 commitments each, is expected to close in the week of May 3, 2026 and will provide funds for general corporate purposes ahead of key clinical and regulatory milestones, signaling internal confidence in the company’s late-stage pipeline.

The offering, conducted as a private placement exempt from U.S. registration requirements, underscores continued support from company insiders and a leading shareholder as NeuroSense navigates upcoming data readouts and regulatory interactions. While modest in size, the premium-priced raise helps bolster liquidity and may strengthen the company’s positioning in the competitive neurodegenerative drug development space as it works to sustain its Nasdaq listing and advance its programs.

The most recent analyst rating on (NRSN) stock is a Buy with a $3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Neurosense Therapeutics Ltd. stock, see the NRSN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NRSN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NRSN is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by weak financial performance (pre-revenue losses, negative cash flow, negative equity and declining assets), with technicals also weighing on the outlook as the stock trades below major moving averages with negative MACD. Valuation provides limited support given the negative P/E and no dividend yield data.

NeuroSense Therapeutics Ltd. is a late-clinical stage biotechnology company developing combination therapies for severe neurodegenerative diseases such as amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, Alzheimer’s disease and Parkinson’s disease. The company targets multiple disease pathways based on biomarker research to address significant unmet medical needs in this field.

B2Gold ( (TSE:BTO) ) has provided an update.

B2Gold Corp. has called its Annual General and Special Meeting of shareholders for June 4, 2026, in Vancouver, British Columbia, setting April 13, 2026 as the record date for voting eligibility. Shareholders will receive materials via a notice-and-access system, with electronic access to the management information circular and the option to request paper copies.

At the meeting, investors will vote on receiving the audited 2025 financial statements, electing directors and reappointing PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as auditor. They will also consider an increase to the cap on common shares issuable under the Restricted Share Unit Plan from 30 million to 40 million shares and cast a non-binding advisory vote on the company’s executive compensation approach, decisions that could affect future equity dilution and governance alignment with shareholder interests.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BTO) stock is a Hold with a C$6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on B2Gold stock, see the TSE:BTO Stock Forecast page.

The score is anchored by improved 2025 operating/earnings performance and a low-leverage balance sheet, supported by generally positive earnings-call commentary on liquidity and project pipeline. Offsetting these are weak technical momentum (downtrend/negative MACD) and concerns about cash-flow consistency plus near-term production headwinds and execution risks (notably Goose and permitting timing).

data.title: Electromagnetic Geoservices Sells Core EM Business to Riggs Holdco
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from ElectroMagnetic GeoServices ASA ( (DE:E2M) ).

Electromagnetic Geoservices ASA has completed the previously announced sale of its entire business operations and assets, including hardware, intellectual property, contracts and all employees, to Riggs Holdco AS. As a result, the company no longer owns or operates the electromagnetic surveying business and is left with only a limited cash position that does not exceed its total liabilities.

The board will now launch a follow-on process to assess the company’s future strategy and structure, and plans to update shareholders once it has a recommendation. Former CEO Bjørn Petter Lindhom and CFO Anders Eimstad will continue in their roles within the transferred EM business under the new owner and provide transitional services to the listed company, which must also change its name within six months.

More about ElectroMagnetic GeoServices ASA

Electromagnetic Geoservices ASA operates in the geophysical services industry, providing electromagnetic surveying technologies and related hardware, intellectual property and services to the energy and subsurface exploration markets. Its business has centered on specialized EM data acquisition and interpretation for offshore and other resource-focused clients.

Average Trading Volume: 3,240,784

Current Market Cap: NOK34.31M

See more insights into E2M stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
